name: PageInfo
summary: This is the interface to a Document's paper space information. The paper size and margins, display resolution, and colors can all be accessed and set through this class.

methods.name: print_margins?
methods.summary: The #print_margins? method returns whether to print the paper's margins.
methods.remarks: The #print_margins? method returns whether to print the paper's margins.

methods.name: print_paper_color?
methods.summary: The #print_paper_color? method returns whether or not the page color should be printed.
methods.remarks: The #print_paper_color? method returns whether or not the page color should be printed.

methods.name: show_margins?
methods.summary: The #show_margins? method returns whether the paper's margins are visible.
methods.remarks: The #show_margins? method returns whether the paper's margins are visible.

properties.name: bottom_margin
properties.summary: The #bottom_margin method returns the paper's bottom margin in inches.
properties.remarks: The #bottom_margin method returns the paper's bottom margin in inches.

properties.name: color
properties.summary: The #color method returns the paper's color.
properties.remarks: The #color method returns the paper's color.

properties.name: display_resolution
properties.summary: The #display_resolution method returns the on screen rendering resolution quality.
properties.remarks: The #display_resolution method returns the on screen rendering resolution quality. The resolution can be one of the following values: Layout::PageInfo::RESOLUTION_LOW Layout::PageInfo::RESOLUTION_MEDIUM Layout::PageInfo::RESOLUTION_HIGH

properties.name: height
properties.summary: The #height method returns the paper height in inches.
properties.remarks: The #height method returns the paper height in inches.

properties.name: image_display_resolution
properties.summary: The #image_display_resolution method returns the on screen image quality.
properties.remarks: The #image_display_resolution method returns the on screen image quality. The resolution can be one of the following values: Layout::PageInfo::RESOLUTION_LOW Layout::PageInfo::RESOLUTION_MEDIUM Layout::PageInfo::RESOLUTION_HIGH

properties.name: image_output_resolution
properties.summary: The #image_output_resolution method returns the output image quality.
properties.remarks: The #image_output_resolution method returns the output image quality. The resolution can be one of the following values: Layout::PageInfo::RESOLUTION_LOW Layout::PageInfo::RESOLUTION_MEDIUM Layout::PageInfo::RESOLUTION_HIGH

properties.name: left_margin
properties.summary: The #left_margin method returns the paper's left margin in inches.
properties.remarks: The #left_margin method returns the paper's left margin in inches.

properties.name: margin_color
properties.summary: The #margin_color method returns the color of the paper's margin.
properties.remarks: The #margin_color method returns the color of the paper's margin.

properties.name: output_resolution
properties.summary: The #output_resolution method returns the output rendering resolution quality.
properties.remarks: The #output_resolution method returns the output rendering resolution quality. The resolution can be one of the following values: Layout::PageInfo::RESOLUTION_LOW Layout::PageInfo::RESOLUTION_MEDIUM Layout::PageInfo::RESOLUTION_HIGH

properties.name: print_margins
properties.summary: The #print_margins= method sets whether to print the paper's margins.
properties.remarks: The #print_margins= method sets whether to print the paper's margins.

properties.name: print_paper_color
properties.summary: The #print_paper_color= method sets whether or not the page color should be printed.
properties.remarks: The #print_paper_color= method sets whether or not the page color should be printed.

properties.name: right_margin
properties.summary: The #right_margin method returns the paper's right margin in inches.
properties.remarks: The #right_margin method returns the paper's right margin in inches.

properties.name: show_margins
properties.summary: The #show_margins= method sets whether the paper's margins are visible.
properties.remarks: The #show_margins= method sets whether the paper's margins are visible.

properties.name: top_margin
properties.summary: The #top_margin method returns the paper's top margin in inches.
properties.remarks: The #top_margin method returns the paper's top margin in inches.

properties.name: width
properties.summary: The #width method returns the paper width in inches.
properties.remarks: The #width method returns the paper width in inches.
